signals.headline: Polymarket Confirms Ethereum Hit Above $4,600 in October 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket Confirms Ethereum Hit Above $4,600 in October 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Polymarket prediction market "What price will Ethereum hit in October?" has resolved with "↑ 4600" at 100% probability, indicating Ethereum surpassed $4,600 during October 2025, as shares in the correct outcome redeem for $1.[4] This resolution, with $27.5 million in trading volume, marks a definitive out
